\"Record, when relevant, the start and t: "Rekhoda, lapho kufanelekile, ilanga lokuthoma nolokugcina lobudlelwano." (ISDF 6.3) Faka ilanga ngendlela ofuna lubonakale ngayo ekhasini lokubuka lomsebenzi, usebenzisa iinkwalifaya namkha izimpawu zokubhala uma ufuna ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki.
\"Use this note to record any other desc: "Sebenzisa leli nothi ukurekhoda olunye ilwazi oluhlathululako olubhekwa njengokuqakathekileko kodwa olungangeni eziinhlathululweni zamanye amanothi." (RAD 1.8B21)
%1% draft(s) available (visit %2%newest: %1% okusalungiswa(s) kuyafumaneka (visit %2%okutjhaest additions%3% ikhasi ku phequlula them)
%1% upload limit of %2% GB exceeded for: Umkhawulo wokulayishwa kwe-%1% we-%2% GB udluliwe ku-%3%
%1%Export initiated.%2% Check %3%job man: %1%Thumela ngaphandle initiated.%2% Check %3%umsebenzi ukuphatha%4% ikhasi ku dawuniloda the imiphumela when it has completed.
%open_strong_tag%Note:%close_strong_tag%: %open_strong_tag%Qaphela:%close_strong_tag% I-AtoM ingase isuse amaphakheji okukhishwa ngemva kwesikhathi ukuze ikhulule indawo yokugcina. Uma okukhishiwe sekulungile kufanele ukulande ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka.
<strong>Label:</strong> Enter a name for:
Ilebula: Faka ibizo lenkambu yesihlonzi esihlukile elikhombisa injongo nokusetjenziswa kwayo.
Isikhombi: Faka ikhodi yereferensi yakuyakha, isikhombi esihlukile, namkha olunye uchungechunge lwezinhlamvu nezinombolo oluhlobene nerekhodi.
A coded designation for the copyright st: A coded designation ye the ilungelo lobunikazi ubujamo ye the into at the time the isitatimende samalungelo is irekhodied.
A condition namkha umkhawuloation ku the act.
A list of special chars, separated by co: A irhelo ye special chars, separated by coma, ku be escaped ku string queries
A slug based on this name already exists: A slug based ku this ibizo already exists so a number has been added ku pad the slug.
A slug based on this title already exist: A slug based ku this isihloko already exists so a number has been added ku pad the slug.
Add an alpha-numeric code to uniquely id: Faka ikhodi enezinhlamvu nezinombolo ukuze uhlonze ngokuyingqayizivele le nqolobane ye-OAI ngaphakathi kwendawo yayo yenethiwekhi, ukuze kudalwe isikhombi esiyingqayizivele esihambisana ne-OAI, isb. oai:foo.org:inqolobanecode_10001
Add your digital objects by dragging and: Faka izinto zakho zedijithali ngokuhudula nokudedela amafayili endawo efasiteleni elingezansi, namkha ngokuchofoza isihlanganisi sokuphequlula ukuze uvule isihloli samafayili sakho.
Additional information about the license: Ilwazi olwengeziwe mayelana nelayisense, njengabantu bokuxhumana, amalanga zezenzo, namkha iinhlathululo. Inothi lingabuye libonise indawo yelayisense, uma ifumanakala ku-inthanethi namkha ifakwe ngaphakathi entweni uqobo.
All descendants or just digital objects: Zoke izinto ezingaphasi namkha izinto zedijithali kwaphela
Allow any valid URI PATH segment charact: Vumela namkha yiluphi uhlamvu oluvumelekile lwengxenye ye-URI PATH ukuba luvele ku-slug, kuhlanganise nama-glyph e-UTF-8. Izinhlamvu ze-IRI ezikhawulelwe ( /?#{} ) nezikhala zangempela zizoshintshwa zibe amadeshi
An API key must be sent in the HTTP requ: An API key kufanele kube sent ku the HTTP request ZZZ header ku authenticate requests
An identifying designation for the statu: An identifying designation ye the statute. Use standard citation form when applicable, e.g. bibliographic citation.
Any field except finding aid text: Nanyana ngiyiphi ikambu ngaphandle kombhalo wethulusi lokufuna amarekhodi
Kusebenza kuphela kumasayithi anezinqolobane eziningi. Uma kusethwe ku-"yebo", okukhethwa kukho ezengeziwe zokusesha nokuphequlula zizofumanakala ezingeni lenqolobane
Are you sure you want to delete %1% and: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa %1% nakho koke okungaphansi kwayo?
Are you sure you want to delete the %1%: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa i-%1% exhunywe ku-%2%?
Are you sure you want to delete the find: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa ithuluzi lokufumana lika-%1%?
Are you sure you want to delete these ca: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa la magama-ncazo/imibhalo fakansi/izahluko?
Are you sure you want to delete this ref: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lokhu kumelwa kwereferensi/isithonjana?
Are you sure you want to delete this rig: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli lungelo?
Are you sure you want to replace \"%1%\": Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukutjhugulula "%1%" ngo-"%2%" ku-%3%?
Authorized form of name - This is a mand: Ifomu eligunyaziweko lebizo - Le yinto ekatelelweko.
Basis for the permissions granted or for: Isisekelo seemvumo ezinikelweko namkha imikhawulo yamalungelo
Bootstrap 2 themes have been deprecated: Izindikimba ze-Bootstrap 2 sezinyakha begodu zizosuswa ekukhishweni okuzayo. Sicela ucabange ukushintshela endikimbeni ye-Bootstrap 5. %1%Ilwazi olwengeziwe.%2%
Both source and replacement fields are r: Kokubili ikambu yomthombo nekambu yokujamiselela kuyafuneka.
CSV Validator default behaviour when CSV: Ukuziphatha okuzenzakalelako komqinisekisi we-CSV nakusetjenziswa ukungeniswa kwe-CSV
CSV validation initiated. Check %1%job %: CSV ukuqinisekisa initiated. Check %1%umsebenzi %2%%3% ku buka the imiphumela ye the ukuqinisekisa.
Cache description XML exports upon creat: Faka ku-cache ukuthunyelwa ngaphandle kwe-XML yehlathululo nakudalwa/nakutjhugululwa
Can be text value or URI (e.g. to Creati: Kungaba inani lombhalo namkha i-URI (isb. ku-Creative Commons, GNU namkha kwamanye amalayisense aku-inthanethi). Kusetjenziswa ukuhlonza isivumelwano sokunika imvume ngokuyingqayizivele ngaphakathi kohlelo lwenqolobane.
Cannot calculate accumulated dates becau: Cannot calculate accumulated amalanga because cha lower level amalanga exist
Cannot calculate accumulated amalanga because this %1% has cha izinto ezingaphasi
Check the %1% page to determine present: Check the %1% ikhasi ku deitemuine present ubujamo. You can keep moving nodes if you don't reload the ikhasi. Once the ikhasi is reloaded, if a move umsebenzi hasn't ended, your recent change(s) may not yet be displayed begodu okutjha changes may fail. After the move umsebenzi ends begodu the ikhasi is reloaded, the treeukubuka kuzoba back ku a stable ubujamo.
Children inheriting rights from record:: Izinto ezingaphasi inheriting amalungelo kusuka ku irekhodi:
Choose the file format for generated Fin: Khetha the ifayili format ye generated Amathulusi wokufuna amarekhodi (PDF namkha 'Rich Umbhalo Format')
Choose whether permalinks for descriptio: Khetha whether permalinks ye iinhlathululo are generated kusuka ku ikhodi yereferensi namkha isihloko
Choosing \"Include descendants\" will in: Ukukhetha okuthi "Faka okusemazingeni angezansi" kuzofaka wwoke amarekhodi asezingeni eliphansi angaphansi kwalawo asebhodini lokunamathisela kulokho okukhishwayo.
Choosing \"Include draft records\" will: Ukukhetha okuthi "Faka amarekhodi asalungiswa" kuzofaka lawo anesimo sokushicilelwa sokuthi Okusalungiswa kulokho okukhishwayo. Qaphela: uma UNGAKHETHI le ndlela, wwoke amarekhodi angaphansi kwerekhodi elisalungiswa nawo azokhishwa, namkha ngabe eseshicilelwe.
Choosing \"Include non-visible elements\: Choosing "Faka non-visible elements" will faka those not marked as Visible Elements.
Click 'Calculate dates' to recalculate t: Click 'Calculate amalanga' ku recalculate the start begodu end amalanga ye a parent-level ihlathululo. A umsebenzi runs ku the background, accounting ye the earliest begodu most recent amalanga across koke the child iinhlathululo. The imiphumela bonisa ku the Start begodu End ikambus ye the hlela ikhasi.
Click Confirm to delete this physical st: Chofoza okuthi Qinisekisa ukuze ususe lokhu kugcinwa komzimba ohlelweni. Lokhu kuzophinde kususe indawo yokugcina komzimba kula marekhodi alandelayo:
Clipboard saved with %1% items. Clipboar: Ibhodi lokunamathisela kulondoloziwe nge %1% items. Ibhodi lokunamathisela ID is %2%. Sicela write this number down. When you want ku reload this ibhodi lokunamathisela ku the future, open the Ibhodi lokunamathisela imenyu, khetha Load ibhodi lokunamathisela, begodu faka this number ku the Ibhodi lokunamathisela ID ikambu.
Content in this area will appear below a: Content ku this indawo will appear below an kulayishiwe banner begodu above the isikhungo's ihlathululo areas. It kungaba used ku offer a summary ye the isikhungo's mandate, faka a tag line namkha ukungenisaant ilwazi, etc. HTML begodu inline CSS kungaba used ku style the contents.
Creator: Umakhi
DACS, 2nd ed. Society of American Archiv: DACS, 2nd ed. Society ye American Umlondolozi wamarekhodis
Date that the decision to ascribe the ri: Ilanga okwenziwa ngalo isinqumo sokuhlobanisa ilungelo nalo mthetho. Lokhu kusebenzela umongo wanamkha yikuphi ukubuyekezwa namkha ukuchazwa kabusha kwesikhathi esizayo.
Dates of creation, revision and deletion: Amalanga ye creation, ukubuyekezwa begodu deletion
%1% layisha umkhawulo ye a okutjha %2%.  A value ye "0" (zero) disables ifayili layisha.  A value ye "-1" allows unumkhawuloed uploads okuzenzakalelako
Default archival description browse view: ihlathululo yamarekhodi agcinweko phequlula buka okuzenzakalelako
Default publication status for newly cre: ubujamo sokushicilelwa ye okutjhaly kudaliwe namkha ukungenisaed %1% okuzenzakalelako
Delete an existing %1% to reduce disk us: Susa an okukhona %1% ku reduce disk usage
Delete current rights in descendants and: Susa kwamanje amalungelo ku izinto ezingaphasi begodu tjhugulula nge parent amalungelo.
Delete matches and replace with imported: Susa matches begodu tjhugulula nge ukungenisaed amarekhodi
Delete matches and replace with imports: Susa matches begodu tjhugulula nge ukungenisas
Describe the nature of the relationship: Describe the nature ye the relationship between the function begodu the related resource. (ISDF 6.2)
Determines whether to show a link to the: Deitemuines whether ku bonisa a isihlanganisi ku the phequlula hierarchy ikhasi ku the ilwazi izinto phequlula/sesha ikhasis
Determines whether to sort siblings in t: Deitemuines whether ku sort siblings ku the ilwazi into treeukubuka control begodu, if so, what sort iinkambiso ku use
Did you follow a broken link?: Did you follow a broken isihlanganisi?
Digital objects with restricted access o: Izinto zedijithali ezinokufinyelela okukhawulelwe namkha ilungelo lobunikazi ngeke zikhishwe.
Display Privacy Notification on first vi: Display Privacy Notification ku first visit ku site
Display multiple linked digital objects: Bonisa izinto zedijithali eziningi ezixhunywe nencazelo eyodwa yezinqolobane
Do not use any special characters or spa: Ungasebenzisi izinhlamvu ezikhethekile namkha izikhala egameni lefayela - kuzolondolozwa kuphela izinhlamvu nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye izinhlamvu zizosuswa namkha zishintshwe. Ukuhlela ibizo lefayela ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzakalela ezinye izinkambu.

Ungasebenzisi izinhlamvu ezikhethekile namkha izikhala ku-slug - kuzolondolozwa kuphela izinhlamvu nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye izinhlamvu zizosuswa namkha zishintshwe. Ukuhlela i-slug ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzakalela ezinye izinkambu.
Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Me: Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Imethadatha Initiative
Editing the authorized form of name will: Ukuhlela ifomu eligunyaziwe legama kuzobuyekeza ngokuzenzakalela inkambu ye-slug uma ibhokisi elithi "Buyekeza i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Editing the description title will autom: Ukuhlela isihloko sencazelo kuzobuyekeza ngokuzenzakalela inkambu ye-slug uma ibhokisi elithi "Buyekeza i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Email your <a href=\"mailto:%1%\">system: I-imeyili your umlawuli wohlelo begodu request a larger layisha umkhawulo
Enable or disable the display of certain: Vula namkha khubaza ukuboniswa kwezingxenye ezithile zekhasi. Ngaphandle uma zishintshwe yindikimba ethile, lezi zilungiselelo zizosetjenziswa kuyo yoke isayithi.
Enter free-text information, including q: Faka ilwazi lombhalo ovulekile, kuhlanganise nezichasiso namkha izimpawu zokubhala zokukhombisa ukungaqiniseki, ukuze ushintshe indlela ilanga olubonakala ngayo. Uma le nkambu ingasetjenziswa, okuzenzakalelako kuzoba iminyaka yokokuthoma neyokugcina kuphela.
Enter the ID of the saved clipboard you: Enter the ID ye the kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela you would like ku load.
Enter the ilungelo lobunikazi ilanga lokugcina, if known. Acceptable ilanga format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the copyright start date, if known: Enter the ilungelo lobunikazi ilanga lokuthoma, if known. Acceptable ilanga format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the email address(es) of at least: Faka ikheli namkha amakheli e-imeyili okungenani omlawuli oyedwa wenqolobane. Amakheli amaningi angafakwa, ahlukaniswe ngamakhoma. La makheli azovezwa njengengxenye yempendulo esicelweni se-Identify.
Enter the end year. Do not use any quali: Faka unyaka wokugcina. Ungasebenzisi iinkwalifaya namkha izimpawu zokubhala ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.

Enter the end year. Do not use any qualifiers namkha typographical symbols ku express uncertainty. If the start begodu end years are the same, faka data only ku the "Ilanga" ikambu begodu leave the "Ilanga lokugcina" blank.
Enter the start year. Do not use any qua: Enter the start year. Do not use any qualifiers namkha typographical symbols ku express uncertainty.
Faka unyaka wokuthoma. Ungasebenzisi iinkwalifaya namkha izimpawu zokubhala ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.
Error: You must have at least one %1%Lev: Iphutha: Kufanele ukhethe okungenani %1%Izinga lencazelo%2% elilodwa namkha ukhethe %1%Faka wwoke amazinga encazelo angaphansi%2% ukuze uqhubeke.
Escape special chars from searches: Escape special chars kusuka ku searches
External URL to send clipboard contents: External URL ku send ibhodi lokunamathisela contents ku
Files not uploaded successfully. Please: Amafayili not kulayishiwe ngempumelelo. Sicela retry.
Files successfully uploaded! Press the \: Amafayili ngempumelelo kulayishiwe! Press the \\'Ngenisa\\' button ku complete ukungenisaing these amafayili.
Finding Aid model:\n- Inventory summary::
Ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi model:
- Inventory summary: will faka only key details ye lower-level iinhlathululo
  (ifayili, item, part) ku a table
- Full details: faka phakathis full lower-level iinhlathululo ku the same format used
  throughout the ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi
Generate Finding Aid as public user: Khiqiza Ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi as public umsebenzisi
Generate archival description reports as: Khiqiza ihlathululo yamarekhodi agcinweko imibiko as public umsebenzisi
Google Maps Javascript API key (for disp: Google Maps Javascript API key (ye displaying dynamic maps)
HTTP method to use when sending clipboar: HTTP method ku use when sending ibhodi lokunamathisela contents
Hierarchical list of menus for the site,: Hierarchical irhelo ye menus ye the site, first column
ISAAR(CPF), 2nd ed. International Counci: ISAAR(CPF), 2nd ed. International Council ku I-akhayivus
ISAD(G), 2nd ed. International Council o: ISAD(G), 2nd ed. International Council ku I-akhayivus
ISDIAH, 1st ed. International Council on: ISDIAH, 1st ed. International Council ku I-akhayivus
If \"no\", just show one OAI set per col: If "cha", just bonisa one OAI set per collection
If job hasn't already completed, check %: If umsebenzi hasn't already completed, check %1% ikhasi ku deitemuine present ubujamo.
If no levels are selected, the export wi: Uma kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, ukukhishwa kuzohluleka. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/namkha u-shift ukuze ukhethe amanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga encazelo. Kuyadingeka ukufaka izinga namkha amazinga angaphezulu kwezinga ofuna ukulithumela ngaphandle, kuze kufike begodu kufake izinga elisebhodini lokunamathisela. Kungenjalo, awekho amarekhodi azofakwa ekukhishweni.
If the finding aid is an uploaded PDF, t: If the ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi is an kulayishiwe PDF, the transcript kuzoba kususiwe too.
If the page number does not exist, the d: If the ikhasi number does not exist, the derivative kuzoba generated kusuka ku the previous closest one.
If you are importing a SKOS file to a ta: If you are ukungenisaing a SKOS ifayili ku a uhlelo lokuhlukanisa other than izihloko, sicela go ku the %1%
Ignore matches and create new records on: Ignore matches begodu yakha okutjha amarekhodi ku ngenisa
Ignore matches and import as new: Ignore matches begodu ngenisa as okutjha
Import file initiated. Check %1%job %2%%: Ngenisa ifayili initiated. Check %1%umsebenzi %2%%3% ku buka the ubujamo ye the ngenisa.
In the \"Action\" selector, indicate whe: Kusikhethi esithi "Isenzo", bonisa ukuthi ufuna ukuhlanganisa ibhodi lokunamathisela elilondoloziwe nokufakiwe ebhodini lamanje namkha ukutjhugulula (ukubhala phezu) ibhodi lamanje ngelilondoloziwe.
Incorrect ibhodi lokunamathisela ID begodu/namkha isenzo.
It has %1% descendants that will also be: It has %1% izinto ezingaphasi that will also be kususiwe
It has %1% izinto ezingaphasi that will also be kususiwe:
It is not possible to select both digita: Akunakwenzeka ukukhetha kokubili izinto zedijithali nezinto ezingezansi ukuze zikhishwe ngesikhathi esisodwa. Izinto zedijithali zingakhishwa kuphela kumarekhodi asebhodini lokunamathisela.
It's used in %1% events that will also b: It's used ku %1% events that will also be kususiwe
Items per page can be a minimum of %1% a: Items per ikhasi kungaba a minimum ye %1% begodu a maximum ye %2%
Keep current rights in descendants and a: Keep kwamanje amalungelo ku izinto ezingaphasi begodu faka parent amalungelo.
Label: Ilebula
Limit administrator functionality to one: Umkhawulo umlawuli functionality ku one namkha okungeziweko IP addresses, separated by semicolons.
Link multiple digital objects to a singl: Xhumanisa izinto zedijithali eziningi nencazelo eyodwa yezinqolobane
Log creation and change of descriptions: Log creation begodu change ye iinhlathululo
MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library of Congr: MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library ye Congress
Make full width treeview collapsible on: Make full width treeukubuka collapsible ku ihlathululo ikhasis
Make it different from your username: Make it different kusuka ku your username
Make this selection the new default for: Make this selection the okutjha okuzenzakalelako ye okukhona izinto ezingaphasi
Merge saved clipboard with existing clip: Merge kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela nge okukhona ibhodi lokunamathisela imiphumela
Move failed: new and old positions requi: Move kuhlulekile: okutjha begodu okuyakha positions kuyadingeka as numbers
Move not allowed: log in required: Move not allowed: log ku kuyadingeka
Move not allowed: not enough permissions: Move not allowed: not enough iimvumo
Move not needed: new and old positions a: Move not needed: okutjha begodu okuyakha positions are the same
Name: Ibizo
Name - A term with this name already exi: Ibizo - A itemu nge this ibizo already exists.
Name of the person(s) or organization(s): Ibizo ye the person(s) namkha organization(s) which has the authority ku grant iimvumo namkha set amalungelo imikhawulo.
No records were exported for your curren: Awekho amarekhodi akhishiwe ngokukhetha kwakho kwamanje. Sicela %open_link%uvuselele ikhasi bese ukhetha ezinye okukhethwa kukho zokuthumela ngaphandle %close_link%.
Not a CSV file (or CSV columns not recog: Akulona ifayili le-CSV (namkha amakholomu e-CSV awaziwa).
Note: Incorrect security settings can re: Inothi: Incorrect security amalungiselelo can result ku the AtoM web UI becoming inaccessible.
Note: While the date range update is run: Inothi: While the ibanga losuku update is running, the kukhethiwe ihlathululo should not be edited.
Note: clipboard items unclipped in this: Inothi: ibhodi lokunamathisela items unclipped ku this ikhasi kuzoba removed kusuka ku the ibhodi lokunamathisela when the ikhasi is refreshed. You can re-khetha them now, namkha reload the ikhasi ku susa them completely. Using the sort namkha print preukubuka buttons will also cause a ikhasi reload - so anything kwanjely dekukhethiwe kuzoba lost!
Off - validation is not run before CSV i: Kuvaliwe - ukuqinisekisa akuqhutshwa ngaphambi kokungenisa i-CSV
On reporting, the system will return thi: Ekubikeni, uhlelo luzobuyisa le nombolo yemigqa
Oops, we couldn't find any %1 level desc: Oops, we couldn't find any %1 level iinhlathululo.
Oops, we couldn't find any physical stor: Oops, we couldn't find any ukulondolozwa komzimba locations ye the kwamanje resource.
PDF page number for image derivative: PDF ikhasi number ye image derivative
Please %open_link%refresh the page%close: Sicela %open_link%refresh the ikhasi%close_link% ku see progress begodu a dawuniloda isihlanganisi when complete.
Sicela faka a ifayili ku begin uploading.
Please check one or more of the export o: Sicela check one namkha okungeziweko ye the thumela ngaphandle options.
Please clear the application cache and r: Sicela usule inqolobane yesicelo begodu wakhe kabusha inkomba yokusesha uma utjhugulula isilungiselelo sesihlukanisi sekhodi yereferensi.
Please configure your site base URL: Sicela configure your site base URL
Please log in to access that page: Sicela ungene ukuze ufinyelele kulelo khasi
Please rebuild the search index after up: Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha after uploading diacritics mappings.
Please rebuild the search index if you a: Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha if you are adding okutjha iinlimi.
Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha if you are enabling/disabling Markdown support.
Provide a brief description of the menu: Provide a brief ihlathululo ye the imenyu begodu it's purpose.
Provide a link to an external website or: Provide a isihlanganisi ku an external website namkha an internal, symfony indlela (module/isenzo).
Provide a menu label for users. For men: Nikeza ilebula yemenyu yabasebenzisi. Ezintweni zemenyu ezingabonakali (okungukuthi ezenhlangano kuphela), lokhu kufanele kushiywe kungenalutho.
Provide an internal menu name. This is: Provide an internal imenyu ibizo.  This is not visible ku abasebenzisi.
RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council: RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council ye I-akhayivus
Record a citation to, and/or information: Rekhoda ukucashunwa kanye/namkha ilwazi ngokushicilelwa okuphathelene namkha okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, namkha ekuhlaziyweni kweyunithi yencazelo. Faka izinkomba kuma-facsimile namkha imibhalo eshicilelwe. (ISAD 3.5.4)
Record a citation to, or information abo: Rekhoda ukucashunwa namkha ilwazi mayelana nokushicilelwa okuphathelene namkha okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, namkha ekuhlaziyweni kwezinto ezichazwayo. Nikeza ilwazi olwanele ukukhombisa ubudlelwano phakathi kokushicilelwa neyunithi echazwayo. Lokhu kufaka izinhlelo ezinezichasiselo. (DACS 6.4.4)
Record notes on sources consulted in pre: Irekhodi amanothi ku imithombo consulted ku preparing the ihlathululo begodu who prepared it. (ISAD 3.7.1)
Record specialized or other important in: Rekhoda ilwazi olukhethekile namkha olunye okuqakathekileko olungahlinzekwanga yinamkha yiziphi izingxenye zencazelo ezichaziwe. (ISAD 3.6.1)
Record the name of the register which gr: Rekhoda ibizo lerejista ehlanganisa le nto yezinqolobane (njengezinto ezibukwayo nezizwakalayo, umsindo, imibhalo yesandla nezithombe). Sesha ibizo elikhona kumarekhodi erejista ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokokuthoma ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, cela ukuthi kudalwe ukufakwa okutjha kwerejista. Umthetho we-NARSSA ka-1996
Record the name(s) of the person(s) who: Rekhoda amabizo abantu abadale namkha ababuyekeze ihlathululo, kanye nosuku lokuyakha namkha lokubuyekeza. (DACS 8.1.5)
Record, as needed, information not accom: Irekhodi, as needed, ilwazi not accommodated by any ye the defined elements ye ihlathululo. (DACS 7.1.2)
Replace existing clipboard results with: Jamiselela okukhona ibhodi lokunamathisela imiphumela nge kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela
Report generation has started, please ch: Umbiko generation has ithomile, sicela check the imibiko ikhasi again soon.
Require SSL for all administrator funcio: Dinga i-SSL kuwo wwoke umsebenzi womlawuli
Require SSL for all administrator functi: Dinga i-SSL kuwo wwoke umsebenzi womlawuli
Requirements: PNG format, 256K max. size:
Izidingo: ifomethi ye-PNG, usayizi omkhulu 256K.
Izilinganiso ezinconyiwe zingu-%1%x%2%px; izonqanyulwa uma i-ImageMagick ifakiwe.
Review the current terms in the Levels o: Buyekeza amatemu akhona ohlelweni lwamazinga encazelo.
Saved clipboard maximum age (in days): Kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela maximum age (ku days)
Search for an existing term in the place: Sesha itemu elikhona ohlelweni lokuhlukanisa izindawo ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokokuthoma ezimbalwa zegama lethemu. Kungenjalo, thayipha itemu elitjha ukuze udale begodu uxhume itemu elitjha lendawo.
Select a date range to overwrite:: Khetha a ibanga losuku ku overwrite:
Select a note type from the drop-down me: Khetha a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu begodu faka inothi umbhalo ku accordance nge RAD 1.8B1 through 1.8B6.

Khetha a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu begodu faka inothi umbhalo ku accordance nge the following sections ku RAD: 1.5E (Accompanying material); 1.8 B11 (Alpha-numeric designations); 1.8B9b (Ukunakekelwa); 1.8B7 (Edition); 1.8B9 (Ngokomzimba Ihlathululo); 1.8B16b (Amalungelo).

Khetha a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu begodu irekhodi, as needed, specialized ilwazi not accommodated by any ye the defined elements ye ihlathululo, including Ukunakekelwa (DACS 7.1.3), Citation (DACS 7.1.5), Alphanumeric designations (DACS 7.1.6), Variant isihloko ilwazi (DACS 7.1.7), namkha Processing ilwazi (DACS 7.1.8).
Select the levels of description to be i: Khetha amazinga encazelo azofakwa ohlwini lwezinto. Uma kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, isihlanganisi sohlu lwezinto ngeke siboniswe. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/namkha u-shift ukuze ukhethe amanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga encazelo.
Set if you want to combine the current s: Setha uma ufuna ukuhlanganisa isethi yamanje yamalungelo nanamkha yimaphi amalungelo akhona, namkha ususe amalungelo akhona bese usebenzisa la malungelo amasha
Set the default view template when brows: Set the okuzenzakalelako buka template when browsing iinhlathululo zezinqolobane
Set the okuzenzakalelako buka template when browsing iinqolobane zamarekhodi
Set the upload limit for this %1%: Set the layisha umkhawulo ye this %1%
Show available drafts notification upon: Show kuyafumaneka okusalungiswas notification upon umsebenzisi login
Site base URL (used in MODS and EAD expo: Site base URL (used ku MODS begodu EAD ukuthumela ngaphandles)
Skipping file %{fileName} because file s: Skipping ifayili %{fileName} because ifayili size %{fileSize} is larger than ifayili size umkhawulo ye %{maxSize} MB
Slug was adjusted to remove special char: Slug was adjusted ku susa special characters namkha
Some files failed to upload. Press the \: Some amafayili kuhlulekile ku layisha. Press the \\'Ngenisa\\' button ku continue ukungenisaing anyways, namkha press \\'Retry\\' ku re-attempt layisha.
Sorry, this Term is locked and cannot be: Uxolo, leli temu likhiyiwe begodu alikwazi ukusulwa
Sorry, you do not have permission to acc: Uxolo, awunayo imvume yokufikelela kulelo khasi
Sorry, you do not have permission to mak: Uxolo, awunayo imvume yokwenza ukuhumusha kolimi lwe-%1%
Strict - validation is run; warnings wil: Strict - ukuqinisekisa is run; warnings will halt ngenisa kusuka ku running
Strip file extensions from information o: Strip ifayili extensions kusuka ku ilwazi into amabizo
Subject: Isihloko
Sync not allowed: log in required: Sync not allowed: log ku kuyadingeka
Text describing the license or agreement: Umbhalo ohlathulula ilayisense namkha isivumelwano esinikeze imvume, namkha isihlanganisi sombhalo ogcwele ogcinwe ku-inthanethi. Lokhu kungaqukatha umbhalo wangempela welayisense namkha wesivumelwano, namkha ukubeka ngamanye amazwi namkha isifinyezo.
Text or HTML to display when sending cli: Umbhalo namkha HTML ku bonisa when sending ibhodi lokunamathisela contents
The \"<strong>%dd%</strong>\" placeholde: The "%dd%" placehkundalaer kuzoba jamiselelad nge a incremental number (e.g. 'image 01', 'image 02')
The %open_link%job management page%close: The %open_link%umsebenzi ukuphatha ikhasi%close_link% will bonisa progress begodu a dawuniloda isihlanganisi when complete.
The OAI-PMH API can be secured, optional: I-OAI-PMH API ingavikelwa, ngokuzikhethela, ngokudinga ukuthi izicelo ze-API ziqinisekiswe ngokusebenzisa okhiye be-API (abanikezwe abasebenzisi abathile).
The Title and Level of description value: The Isihloko begodu Izinga lencazelo values entered ku this ikhasi kuzoba applied ku each child ihlathululo kudaliwe ye the associated izinto zedijithali - '%dd%' represents an incrementing 2-value number, so by okuzenzakalelako iinhlathululo kudaliwe via this uploader kuzoba named image 01, image 02, etc.
The action which is permitted or restric: The isenzo which is permitted namkha restricted.
The beginning date of the permission gra: The beginning ilanga ye the imvume granted.
The character separating hierarchical el: The character separating hierarchical elements ku a ikhodi yereferensi
The clipboard is empty for this entity t: Ibhodi lokunamathisela alinalutho ngalolu hlobo lwebhizinisi.
The code can only contain letters and nu: The code can only contain letters begodu numbers
The country or other political body that: The izwe namkha other political body that has enacted the statute.
The izwe whose ilungelo lobunikazi laws apply.
The current version of the application: The kwamanje version ye the application
The ilanga the ilungelo lobunikazi ubujamo applies.
The ending date of the permission grante: The ending ilanga ye the imvume granted. Omit ilanga lokugcina if the ending ilanga is unknown.
The existing term values are required by: The okukhona itemu values are kuyadingeka by the application ku operate correctly
The following file will be deleted from: The following ifayili kuzoba kususiwe kusuka ku the ifayili system:
The maximum disk space of %1% GB availab: The maximum disk space ye %1% GB kuyafumaneka ye uploading izinto zedijithali has been reached. Sicela contact your AtoM umlawuli wohlelo ku increase the kuyafumaneka disk space.
The maximum disk space ye %1% GB kuyafumaneka ye uploading izinto zedijithali has been reached. Sicela contact your umlawuli wohlelo ku increase the kuyafumaneka disk space.
The maximum number of pixels on the long: The maximum number ye pixels ku the longest edge ye derived reference images.
The number of days a saved clipboard sho: The number ye days a kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela should be retained before it is eligible ye deletion
The number of entities to include in a s: The number ye entities ku faka ku a single OAI response irhelo before inserting a resumption token
The number of records shown per page on: The number ye amarekhodi shown per ikhasi ku irhelo ikhasis
The pdfinfo tool is required to use this: The pdfinfo tool is kuyadingeka ku use this functionality. Sicela contact your umlawuli wohlelo.
The related object(s) will <strong>not</: The related into(s) will not be kususiwe
The system is currently in read-only mod: The system is kwanjely ku read-only mode. Sicela try again later.
The upload limit of %1% GB for <a href=\: The layisha umkhawulo ye %1% GB ye %3% has been exceeded (%4% GB kwanjely used)
The layisha umkhawulo ye %1% GB ye %3% has been reached
The uploads directory has not been creat: The uploads directory has not been kudaliwe yet.
The username or e-mail address you enter: The username namkha e-mail ikheli you entered is already ku use
There was an error loading the clipboard: Kube nephutha ekulayisheni okuqukethwe kwebhodi lokunamathisela.
This feature will not work until a Googl: This feature will not work until a Google Maps API key is specified ku the %1%global%2% amalungiselelo ikhasi.
This is a non-preferred term and cannot: This is a non-preferred itemu begodu akukwazi ukuba edited - sicela use %2%.
This is an auto-generated setting that p: This is an auto-generated setting that produces an OAI compliant inqolobane yamarekhodi isikhombi, which faka phakathis the OAI inqolobane yamarekhodi code value if it is set
This is an example of the auto-generated: This is an example ye the auto-generated, OAI compliant isikhombi which is kudaliwe ye each item ku this particular OAI inqolobane yamarekhodi
This isn't a valid email address: This isn't a valid i-imeyili ikheli
This term is used in %1% records. The te: This itemu is used ku %1% amarekhodi. The itemu kuzoba kususiwe kusuka ku these amarekhodi.
Lo msebenzisi unamanothi angu-%1% ohlelweni. La manothi ngeke asuswe, kodwa ukuhlobana kwawo nalo msebenzisi kuzosuswa.
This value can not be greater than %max%: Leli nani alikwazi ukuba ngaphezu kuka-%max% pixels
This value cannot be more than %max%: This value akukwazi ukuba okungeziweko than %max%
This value must be at least %min%: This value kufanele kube at least %min%
This value must be at least %min% pixels: This value kufanele kube at least %min% pixels
Title: Isihloko
Unable to upload diacritics mapping yaml: Unable ku layisha diacritics mapping yaml ifayili.
Unable to upload diacritis mapping yaml: Unable ku layisha diacritis mapping yaml ifayili.
Update matches ignoring blank fields in: Update matches ignoring blank ikambus ku CSV
Updating an existing date range will per: Updating an okukhona ibanga losuku will permanently overwrite the kwamanje amalanga.
Upload limit of %{maxPostSize} MB reache: Layisha umkhawulo ye %{maxPostSize} MB reached. Unable ku faka additional amafayili.
Upload multi-page files as multiple desc: Layisha multi-ikhasi amafayili as multiple iinhlathululo
Uploaded finding aid could not be moved: Kulayishiwe ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi could not be moved ku the downloads
Use any valid URI path segment and upper: Use any valid URI indlela segment begodu uppercase character ku slugs
Use the actor name field to link an auth: Sebenzisa inkambu yegama lomlingisi ukuxhumanisa irekhodi legunya nale ncazelo. Sesha ibizo elikhona kumarekhodi egunya ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokokuthoma ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, thayipha ibizo elitjha ukuze udale begodu uxhume irekhodi legunya elitjha.
Use these options to specify how the dat:
Use these options ku specify how the ibanga losuku returns imiphumela. "Exact" means
that the start begodu end amalanga ye iinhlathululo returned kufanele fall entirely within
the ibanga losuku entered. "Overlapping" means that any ihlathululo whose start namkha
end amalanga touch namkha overlap the target ibanga losuku kuzoba returned.
Use this interface to update the authori: Use this interface ku update the ifomu eligunyaziwe legama, slug (permalink), begodu/namkha %1% ifayiliname.
Use this interface to update the descrip: Use this interface ku update the ihlathululo isihloko, slug (permalink), begodu/namkha %1% ifayiliname.
View children as a compound %1%?: Buka izinto ezingaphasi as a compound %1%?
Buka the full irhelo ye izinto ezingaphasi.
We couldn't find any results matching yo: We couldn't find any imiphumela matching your sesha.
We've redirected you to the first page o: We've redirected you ku the first ikhasi ye imiphumela. To avoid using vast amounts ye memory, AtoM umkhawulos pagination ku %1% amarekhodi. Sicela, narrow down your imiphumela.

We've redirected you ku the first ikhasi ye imiphumela. To avoid using vast amounts ye memory, AtoM umkhawulos pagination ku %1% amarekhodi. To buka the last amarekhodi ku the kwamanje result set, try changing the sort direction.
When disabled: Finding Aid links are not:
When kuvaliwe: Ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi iinhlanganisi are not displayed, Ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi generation is
kuvaliwe, begodu the 'Advanced Sesha > Ithuluzi lokufumana amarekhodi' filter is hidden.
When enabled the following text will app: When enabled the following umbhalo will appear ku the %1% imethadatha section ku describe how a umsebenzisi may ukufikelela the original begodu ukulondoloza khophi ye the ifayili stored ku a linked yedijithali ukulondoloza system. The umbhalo appears ku the "Iimvumo" ikambu. When kuvaliwe, the "Iimvumo" ikambu is not displayed.

When enabled the following umbhalo will appear whenever a umsebenzisi tries ku dawuniloda a %1% master nge an associated isitatimende samalungelo where the Basis = ilungelo lobunikazi begodu the Ukuvinjelwa = conditional. You can style begodu customize the umbhalo as ku a static ikhasi.
When enabled, an &quot;Upload limit&quot: When enabled, an "Layisha umkhawulo" meter is displayed ye authenticated abasebenzisi ku the %1% buka ikhasi, begodu administrators can umkhawulo the disk space each %1% is allowed ye %2% uploads
When enabled, the copyright pop-up will: When enabled, the ilungelo lobunikazi pop-up kuzoba applied ku every %1%, regardless ye whether there is an accompanying Isitatimende samalungelo.
When set to &quot;no&quot;, the reposito: When set ku "cha", the inqolobane yamarekhodi ibizo is excluded kusuka ku certain displays because it kuzoba too repetitive
When set to &quot;yes&quot;, the referen: When set ku "yebo", the ikhodi yereferensi string kuzoba built using the ilwazi into isikhombi plus the iinkhombi ye koke its ancestors
When set to 'yes' generated Finding Aids: When set ku 'yebo' generated Amathulusi wokufuna amarekhodi will thumela ngaphandle Okusalungiswas
You can check %1% page to determine the: You can check %1% ikhasi ku deitemuine the kwamanje ubujamo ye the update umsebenzi.
You cannot show more than %max% hits per: You cannot bonisa okungeziweko than %max% hits per ikhasi
You may only clear jobs belonging to you: You may only clear imisebenzi belonging ku you.
You must show at least %min% hits per pa: You kufanele bonisa at least %min% hits per ikhasi
You will also be able to review and indi: You will also be able ku reukubuka begodu individually modify each ihlathululo isihloko ku the next ikhasi after clicking "Layisha."
Your %entity_type% export package is bei: Your %entity_type% thumela ngaphandle package is being built.
Your browser does not support JavaScript: Isiphequluli sakho asisekeli i-JavaScript. Bona %1%izidingo ezincane%2%.
Your description has been updated. Lower: Your ihlathululo has been kubuyekeziwe. Lower level iinhlathululo are being kubuyekeziwe now – check the umsebenzi scheduler ikhasi ye ubujamo begodu details.
Your edits to this description have been: Ukuhlela kwakho kule ncazelo kulondoloziwe begodu ihlathululo ibuyele esimweni sokusalungiswa. Sicela ucele umsebenzisi onezimvume ezanele ukuthi aphinde ashicilele ihlathululo ukuze ibonakale emphakathini.
Your password confirmation did not match: Ukuqinisekiswa kwephasiwedi yakho akufananga nephasiwedi yakho.
Your term has been updated. Its related: Your itemu has been kubuyekeziwe. Its iinhlathululo ezihlobene are being kubuyekeziwe asynchronously – check the umsebenzi scheduler ikhasi ye ubujamo begodu details.
or, create a new date range: namkha, yakha a okutjha ibanga losuku
